recommendations.title: The Pope's Exorcist
recommendations.overview: Father Gabriele Amorth, Chief Exorcist of the Vatican, investigates a young boy's terrifying possession and ends up uncovering a centuries-old conspiracy the Vatican has desperately tried to keep hidden.

recommendations.title: Samaritan

recommendations.title: Overlord
recommendations.overview: France, June 1944. On the eve of D-Day, some American paratroopers fall behind enemy lines after their aircraft crashes while on a mission to destroy a radio tower in a small village near the beaches of Normandy. After reaching their target, the surv

recommendations.title: Get the Gringo
recommendations.overview: A career criminal nabbed by Mexican authorities is placed in a tough prison where he learns to survive with the help of a 9-year-old boy.

recommendations.title: Silverton Siege
recommendations.overview: After a failed sabotage mission, a trio of anti-apartheid freedom fighters ends up in a tense bank hostage situation. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Seven Samurai

recommendations.title: Faces Places
recommendations.overview: Director Agnès Varda and photographer/muralist JR journey through rural France and form an unlikely friendship.

recommendations.title: White Boy Rick
recommendations.overview: The story of Richard Wershe Jr., a teenager who became an undercover informant for the police during the 1980s, and was ultimately arrested for drug trafficking and sentenced to life in prison.

recommendations.title: In the Line of Fire
